/answerArm extended, hand at chest height, moderate force, forward, upward. Toss the palm-sized object by extending the arm fully with the hand positioned at chest height, applying moderate force to send it forward while simultaneously lifting it upward in a smooth, coordinated motion. The arm should remain extended throughout the action as the hand propels the object upwards and outwards. This method ensures an efficient and controlled toss.
